inputs.label: Mass
inputs.businessContext: Mass of the substance to be vaporized.

businessContext_i18n.en: Mass of the substance to be vaporized.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Masse de la substance à vaporiser
businessContext_i18n.es: Masa de la sustancia a vaporizar

inputs.label: Initial Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Starting temperature of the liquid before heating.

businessContext_i18n.en: Starting temperature of the liquid before heating.
businessContext_i18n.de: Starttemperatur der Flüssigkeit vor dem Erhitzen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Température initiale du liquide avant chauffage
businessContext_i18n.es: Temperatura inicial del líquido antes del calentamiento
businessContext_i18n.ar: درجة الحرارة الابتدائية للسائل قبل التسخين

inputs.label: Boiling Point
inputs.businessContext: Boiling point of the liquid at the given pressure.

businessContext_i18n.en: Boiling point of the liquid at the given pressure.
businessContext_i18n.de: Siedepunkt der Flüssigkeit bei gegebenem Druck.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Point d'ébullition du liquide à la pression donnée
businessContext_i18n.es: Punto de ebullición del líquido a la presión dada
businessContext_i18n.ar: نقطة غليان السائل عند الضغط المعطى

inputs.label: Specific Heat Capacity
inputs.businessContext: Specific heat capacity of the liquid phase (constant pressure).

businessContext_i18n.en: Specific heat capacity of the liquid phase (constant pressure).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sıvı fazın özgül ısı kapasitesi (sabit basınç).
businessContext_i18n.de: Spezifische Wärmekapazität der flüssigen Phase (konstanter Druck).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Capacité thermique massique de la phase liquide (pression constante)
businessContext_i18n.es: Capacidad calorífica específica de la fase líquida (presión constante)
businessContext_i18n.ar: السعة الحرارية النوعية للطور السائل (عند ضغط ثابت)

inputs.label: Latent Heat of Vaporization
inputs.businessContext: Energy required to vaporize one kilogram of the liquid at boiling point.

businessContext_i18n.en: Energy required to vaporize one kilogram of the liquid at boiling point.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kaynama noktasında bir kilogram sıvıyı buharlaştırmak için gereken enerji.
businessContext_i18n.de: Energie, die benötigt wird, um ein Kilogramm der Flüssigkeit am Siedepunkt zu verdampfen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Énergie nécessaire pour vaporiser un kilogramme du liquide au point d'ébullition
businessContext_i18n.es: Energía requerida para vaporizar un kilogramo del líquido en el punto de ebullición
businessContext_i18n.ar: الطاقة اللازمة لتبخير كيلوجرام واحد من السائل عند نقطة الغليان

inputs.label: Heating Efficiency
inputs.businessContext: Efficiency of the heating system (100% means no losses).

businessContext_i18n.en: Efficiency of the heating system (100% means no losses).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Isıtma sisteminin verimliliği (%100 kayıp olmadığı anlamına gelir).
businessContext_i18n.de: Wirkungsgrad des Heizsystems (100% bedeutet keine Verluste).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Rendement du système de chauffage (100% signifie aucune perte).
businessContext_i18n.es: Eficiencia del sistema de calefacción (100% significa sin pérdidas)
businessContext_i18n.ar: كفاءة نظام التسخين (100% تعني عدم وجود خسائر)

inputs.label: Safety Factor
inputs.businessContext: Multiplier to account for design margins or uncertainties.

businessContext_i18n.en: Multiplier to account for design margins or uncertainties.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tasarım payları veya belirsizlikleri hesaba katmak için çarpan.
businessContext_i18n.de: Multiplikator zur Berücksichtigung von Auslegungsspielräumen oder Unsicherheiten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Multiplicateur pour tenir compte des marges de conception ou des incertitudes.
businessContext_i18n.es: Multiplicador para considerar márgenes de diseño o incertidumbres
businessContext_i18n.ar: معامل لمراعاة هوامش التصميم أو عدم اليقين

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
